data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for grant-level document permission controls.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Grant-level document permission controls'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or documentation related to this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for these controls but lacks concrete evidence that they are being implemented or validated in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: Lack of evidence for validating grant-level document permission controls.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
